temporal_description: A high-angle, wide shot captures a tense meeting in a modern, sterile-looking office. A man in a white shirt and tie stands in the center of the room, looking down with a somber expression. Seated around a large, dark table are four other men, also in white shirts and ties, who appear to be listening intently. The table is cluttered with papers, mugs, and a black cap. In the background, a staircase is visible, and a glass-walled observation booth looks down on the scene. A small, old-fashioned television screen on a stand displays a blank, white image. The on-screen text "风行网" is visible in the upper left corner. The camera cuts to a tight, close-up profile shot of the standing man. He has dark, slightly disheveled hair and a serious, contemplative look on his face. The background is a soft, out-of-focus blue-gray, emphasizing his profile. The "风行网" text remains in the upper left corner of the frame. The shot is static, holding on his pensive expression. A man speaks in a low, somber, and resigned tone, his voice filled with a sense of defeat and acceptance. He quietly admits, "是我的疏忽" (It's my negligence). The background is silent, with no music or other sounds, creating a quiet and serious atmosphere that emphasizes the gravity of his confession.
